docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ALBERTA STANLEY IS PRESENT.
